Stated Restrictions: While these are predominantly registered Open Space Covenants, there are a small number with different covenant agreements (Kawenata and Life of Trees). In addition, there are 31 formalised covenants. These comprise 17 Landscape Protection Agreements with a territorial authority (e.g., district council) over land that has no legal title, as well as 14 QEII National Trust properties with no registered covenant established prior to the Trust’s ownership. Each year, approximately 110 new covenants are approved by the QEII Board, but each may take, on average, two years to complete the process to registration. In addition, there are a number of changes to existing covenants as a result of subdivisions, changes of ownership, variations and so on.It should be noted that a small number of QEII National Trust protected areas are not included in this publicly available dataset for privacy reasons.

Dataset name: Hauraki Gulf / Tīkapa Moana Marine Protection Act
Stated Restrictions: To provide accurate spatial data for marine protection areas mandated by the Hauraki Gulf / Tīkapa Moana Marine Protection Act 2025, supporting decision-making, compliance, and public information. Custom license, Crown copyright, but permissive.

Dataset name: DOC Sanctuaries to Protect Marine Mammals
Stated Restrictions: Extent of the areas defining Marine Mammal Sanctuaries for the protection of whales, dolphins, seals and sea lions administered by the Department of Conservation (DOC).
